posts.title: Our first recording session
posts.body: We closed out 2024 by officially becoming a record company — tracking our first two original songs at the brand-new Picture-Minded Studio.

posts.title: An all-day music festival
posts.body: A full day of South Chicago locals taking the stage — one of our proudest early moments.

posts.title: Release parties & a video Christmas special
posts.body: From a video Christmas special to record-release parties at the home studio — we love any reason to celebrate music.
